data.title: New platform LawVine.com connects individuals with attorneys nationwide. Inaugurated by Law Offices of Jason Turchin on Aug. 7, 2025.
data.description: A new online platform, LawVine.com, has been introduced by the Law Offices of Jason Turchin in Weston, Florida on August 7, 2025. This platform aims to assist individuals nationwide in engaging with attorneys, gaining insights on legal matters, and obtaining legal representation. It serves as a valuable resource for individuals seeking legal guidance.

data.title: Sherritt releases 2024 Sustainability Reports, including Annual Report, Climate Report, and Tailings Management Report. TSX: S.
data.description: In Toronto, Sherritt International Corporation (TSX: S) has unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Disclosures comprising the Annual Sustainability Report, Climate Report, Tailings Management Report, and Sustainability Scorecard. These reports scrutinize the Corporation's environmental, social, and governance ("ESG") performance. Highlighting their commitment to sustainability, Sherritt stresses its dedication to operating responsibly within host communities.
TESLA DISBANDS DOJO SUPERCOMPUTER TEAM IN BLOW TO AI PROGRAM

data.title: APAA praises Trump for aluminum tariff, Century Aluminum boosts US production by 10% thanks to Section 232 law.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, the American Primary Aluminum Association (APAA) commended President Trump for implementing the Section 232 aluminum tariff. This decision has enabled Century Aluminum, the leading primary aluminum producer in the United States, to boost their production. The tariff has been instrumental in supporting the domestic aluminum industry and ensuring growth in the sector.
MSCI SAYS 42 ADDITIONS TO, 56 DELETIONS FROM ACWI INDEX

data.title: Empower supports executive order to expand investment options in 401(k) plans; includes private investments, cryptocurrency.
data.description: In Greenwood Village, Colorado, Empower has demonstrated substantial backing for a recent executive order instructing the Department of Labor (DOL) to review recommendations concerning unconventional asset investments in retirement plans. The order also calls for collaboration with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Treasury Department to investigate increasing access to a wider array of asset categories in 401(k) and other defined contribution plans. This includes private investments, cryptocurrency, lifetime income, and other investment alternatives.

data.title: Tevra Brands launches Vetality™ products in Walmart nationwide stores in August 2025, expanding pet wellness options.
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska on August 7, 2025, Tevra Brands, a prominent player in pet health and wellness products, revealed the nationwide introduction of their full range of Vetality™ items in Walmart outlets starting in August 2025. This move aligns with Walmart's strategic plan to expand its pet care offerings.

data.title: Con Edison reports 2025 second quarter net income of $246 million compared to $202 million in 2024, $0.68/share vs $0.58/share.
data.description: In New York on August 7, 2025, Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) disclosed its second-quarter financial results for 2025, stating a net income for common stock of $246 million, equivalent to $0.68 per share. This marks an increase from the previous year's second quarter figures of $202 million or $0.58 per share. Adjusted earnings (non-GAAP) were not specifically mentioned in the summary provided. Con Edison is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol ED.

data.title: Northborne Partners advised Weather Shield in its sale to Pella Corp. Financial terms not disclosed. Founded in 1955.
data.description: Announced on August 7, 2025, Northborne Partners has successfully acted as the sole financial advisor for Weather Shield during its acquisition by Pella Corporation. The financial details of the transaction have not been revealed to the public. Weather Shield, established in 1955, specializes in manufacturing windows and doors.

data.title: Roper Technologies prices public offering of $2 billion in senior unsecured notes due 2028, 2030, and 2035 in Sarasota, Florida.
data.description: Roper Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROP) based in Sarasota, Florida, disclosed the pricing details of its recent public offering. The offering consists of $500 million of 4.250% Senior Notes due 2028, $500 million of 4.450% Senior Notes due 2030, and $1 billion of 5.100% Senior Notes due 2035, totaling $2 billion in Senior Notes. These notes are set to close on August 12, 2025, pending the completion of standard closing procedures.

data.title: Lassonde Industries Inc. on TSX: LAS.A reports Q2-2025 financial results in Canada. Aug 07.
data.description: In Rougemont, Quebec, on August 7, 2025, Lassonde Industries Inc. (TSX: LAS.A) released its financial report for the second quarter of 2025. The corporation, commonly known as Lassonde, disclosed its performance data for this period.

data.title: Guardian Capital Group reports Q2 2025 operating results; per share figures stated on a diluted basis.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, in Toronto, all per share numbers provided are on a diluted basis.

data.title: SILVERCORP: Adjusted net income $21.0M ($0.10/share) and cash flow $48.3M for Q1 Fiscal 2026. Trading symbol: TSX/NYSE American: SVM.
data.description: Stock symbols TSX/NYSE AMERICAN: SVM based in Vancouver, BC, disclosed financial and operational details for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. Silvercorp Metals Inc. ("Silvercorp" or "the Company") (TSX: SVM) (NYSE American: SVM) announced its Q1 Fiscal 2026 results recently.

data.title: Tucows Inc. reports growth in revenue and profitability in Q2 2025. All figures are in USD. Momentum continues.
data.description: In its unaudited financial report for the second quarter ending on June 30, 2025, Tucows Inc., a prominent player in global internet services, revealed positive advancements across its business sectors. The company, listed on NASDAQ under TCX and TSX under TC, displayed promising growth in various aspects. All financial figures presented are in U.S. dollars, indicating a strong performance in Q2 highlighted by the company's management.

data.title: Company reorients, secures $10M to boost 2 data-driven ventures, sells Genie® unit to OHAUS Corp affiliate Troemner, LLC.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that an estimated 10,000 jobs will be created in the local economy due to a new manufacturing plant opening. The plant, expected to cost around $50 million to build, will primarily focus on producing renewable energy technologies. This project is significant as it marks a step towards reducing carbon emissions and promoting sustainable practices in the region. Additionally, it is anticipated that the plant will generate approximately $20 million in annual revenue once fully operational. This initiative not only boosts economic growth but also aligns with efforts to address pressing environmental concerns.

data.title: ACEP appoints Michael Fraser, PhD, MS, CAE as next Executive Director to enact advocacy, education, and policy objectives.
data.description: In a recent announcement on August 7, 2025, the American College of Emergency Physicians (ACEP) revealed that Michael Fraser, PhD, MS, CAE will be taking on the role of executive director. He will be tasked with overseeing the advancement of ACEP's advocacy, education, and policy goals, with a particular emphasis on...

data.title: Firefly Aerospace IPO surges post debut; Rocket Lab and Kratos Defense decline post earnings.
data.description: Shares of Firefly Aerospace saw a significant increase after its initial public offering on Thursday. Meanwhile, Rocket Lab and Kratos Defense are anticipated to experience a drop in their stock prices following their earnings reports. Rocket Lab and Kratos encountered challenges, resulting in a decrease in their market value, whereas Firefly Aerospace had a successful debut.

data.title: Bitcoin and ethereum surge to August highs after Trump's EO adding cryptos to 401(k) plans, as per Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Bitcoin and ethereum have reached their highest levels since August following an announcement by President Trump. The Executive Order includes cryptocurrencies and digital assets in 401(k) plans, leading to a surge in the market. This decision has caused Bitcoin to rise sharply and investors are showing increased interest in these digital assets. This development has been well-received in the investment community, with many viewing it as a positive move. The news has had a significant impact on the cryptocurrency market, with Bitcoin and ethereum experiencing notable increases in value.

data.title: AGF Management reports $56.1 billion in assets under management and fee-earning assets as of July 31, 2025.
data.description: As of July 31, 2025, AGF Management Limited (TSX:AGF.B) disclosed that their total assets under management (AUM) and fee-earning assets amounted to $56.1 billion.
